headline: Trimble Announces Integration of The Work Number from Equifax for Vista and Spectrum Customers
summary: Trimble today announced an integration with The Work Number® from Equifax® to provide automated income and employment verifications relying on payroll data, through its Trimble® Spectrum and Trimble Vista™ financial management software. Trimble Vista and Trimble Spectrum® software users can now add efficiency to a historically manual process with verification services from Equifax at no additional cost.

headline: Equifax Recognition And BIK Deal Spotlight Identity Protection And Valuation Gap
summary: Equifax (NYSE:EFX) has been named a Leader in Javelin Strategy & Research's 2026 Direct-to-Consumer Identity Protection Services Vendor Scorecard. The company is expanding its identity verification and fraud prevention reach through a new partnership with Poland's BIK. Equifax, trading at around $170.16, is getting fresh attention for its role in consumer identity protection and fraud prevention. The stock is up 4.0% over the past week but down 20.5% year to date and 35.6% over the past...

headline: Equifax, WEBTOON, and ScanSource Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after the combination of rising oil prices, higher Treasury yields, and shifting rate expectations tightened the macro backdrop for corporate clients.
